request.userPrompt: list all the products which is heavier than 1 kg

response.generatedSQL:
SELECT p.productid, p.name, p.description, p.price, p.stockqty, p.sku
FROM products p
JOIN productattributevalues pav ON p.productid = pav.productid
JOIN attributes a ON pav.attributeid = a.attributeid
WHERE a.name ILIKE 'Weight' AND CAST(pav.valuedecimal AS numeric) > 1 AND a.unit ILIKE 'kg';
response.englishExplanation: This query retrieves data from the 'products', 'productattributevalues', 'attributes' table(s), applying filter conditions.
validationErrors: EAV table 'productattributevalues' is referenced, but the attribute name column 'attribute_name' does not appear in the SQL. Did the LLM use an attribute key as a column name? Expected pattern: WHERE attribute_name = '<key>'

request.userPrompt: list all the students and their departments

response.generatedSQL:
SELECT s.student_id, s.first_name, s.last_name
FROM Students s;
response.englishExplanation: This query retrieves a list of student IDs along with their first and last names from the student database. There are no filters or conditions applied, so it includes all students in the database. The results are not specifically ordered or grouped. The purpose of this query is likely to provide a complete list of students, which could be used for general record-keeping or administrative purposes.
